modules.name: Module 1: Mathematical Foundations & Optimization for ML Engineers

topics.title: Linear Algebra & Matrix Decompositions
subtopics: Vector spaces, basis, span, and projections
Eigendecomposition equations and spectral theorem for symmetric matrices
Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) matrix products derivation
Low-rank matrix approximation and SVD applications in Collaborative Filtering and Latent Semantic Analysis (LSA)

topics.title: Vector & Matrix Calculus
subtopics: Partial derivatives, multivariable gradients, directional derivatives
Jacobian matrix of first-order vector outputs
Hessian matrix of second-order curvatures
Taylor series expansion of multivariable functions, positive definiteness criteria

topics.title: Probability & Information Theory
subtopics: Conditional probability, joint probability, and Bayes' Theorem
Maximum Likelihood Estimation (MLE) vs Maximum A Posteriori (MAP) derivation
Shannon Entropy, Cross-Entropy, and Kullback-Leibler (KL) Divergence math
KL penalty evaluation criteria in probabilistic models

topics.title: Numerical Optimization & Convergence
subtopics: Convex vs non-convex optimization, local vs global minima
Gradient Descent and Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) with momentum
Adaptive learning rates (Adam optimizer bias-correction derivations)
Second-order optimization (Newton-Raphson method and Hessian costs)

topics.title: Numerical Stability & Mixed Precision
subtopics: IEEE 754 float32 representation vs half-precision FP16 and BF16
Underflow and overflow anomalies in deep backpropagations
Mixed-precision training steps and dynamic loss scaling math
Gradient clipping methods (L2 norm boundaries)

modules.name: Module 2: High-Performance Data Engineering & Feature Processing

topics.title: NumPy Internals & Vectorization
subtopics: Contiguous memory blocks (C vs Fortran contiguous layout)
Strides, indexing math, and broadcasting rules
SIMD CPU instructions and vectorized execution benefits

topics.title: Scalable Data Wrangling with Pandas
subtopics: Memory footprints downcasting and columns optimizing
Chunking large datasets during data loads
PyArrow engine integrations and Parquet columnar layouts vs CSV

topics.title: Data Quality & Advanced Imputation
subtopics: Missingness Mechanism Diagnostics: MCAR (Missing Completely at Random), MAR (Missing at Random), MNAR (Missing Not at Random)
Numerical Imputation: Mean, Median, Mode, Constant, and regression-based predictions
Categorical Imputation: Mode, Constant, and new category indicator insertions
Nominal vs Ordinal Variable Handling: Cardinality reductions, target dependencies
Advanced Imputation: KNN Imputation (distance-weighted k-nearest neighbors)
Iterative Imputation: Multivariate Imputation by Chained Equations (MICE) mathematics
Out-of-Distribution (OOD) Detection: Mahalanobis distance, Isolation Forest outlier thresholds

topics.title: Exploratory Data Analysis & Target Leakage
subtopics: VIF (Variance Inflation Factor) for multicollinearity diagnostics
Timeline-based target leakage diagnostics (cross-validation score leaks)
Correlation collinearity vs causality

topics.title: Production Feature Engineering
subtopics: Target encoding with smoothing, one-hot, ordinal encoders
Feature selection via Mutual Information scores
L1 LASSO regularization selection boundaries
UMAP vs t-SNE vs PCA projections

modules.name: Module 3: Core Supervised Algorithms & Mathematical Derivations

topics.title: Linear & Regularized Regression
subtopics: Ordinary Least Squares (OLS) closed-form matrix derivation
Ridge (L2) vs LASSO (L1) regularization geometric boundaries
Gaussian vs Laplace priors in regression models

topics.title: Logistic Regression & Log-Loss
subtopics: Log-loss (binary cross-entropy) derivation from Bernoulli likelihood
Sigmoid gradient mathematical derivation
Newton-Raphson (Iteratively Reweighted Least Squares) optimizer vs GD

topics.title: K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN) & Naive Bayes Algorithms
subtopics: KNN algorithm mechanics, distance metrics (Euclidean, Manhattan, Minkowski)
Curse of Dimensionality in high-dimensional vector spaces
KD-Trees and Ball-Trees for accelerated nearest neighbors search
Naive Bayes classifier mathematical formulation (conditional independence assumption)
Laplace smoothing derivation, Gaussian vs Multinomial vs Bernoulli Naive Bayes

topics.title: Support Vector Machines (SVM)
subtopics: Primal vs Dual formulation and margins math
Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) conditions under soft-margins
Mercer's Kernel Theorem, and RBF kernel projection mechanics

topics.title: Model Evaluation & Class Imbalance Mitigation
subtopics: ROC-AUC vs PR-AUC curves under severe class imbalance
F-beta score selection for asymmetrical costs
Macro vs micro vs weighted averages evaluations
SMOTE nearest neighbors math interpolation algorithm
Class-weighted loss functions
Focal Loss derivation (down-weighting easy examples)

modules.name: Module 4: Model Generalization, Selection & Ensemble Architectures

topics.title: Generalization Theory & Overfitting
subtopics: Overfitting/Underfitting deep diagnostics
Bias-Variance Decomposition mathematical proof
VC Dimension, and Rademacher Complexity bounds

topics.title: Advanced Cross-Validation Protocols
subtopics: Nested cross-validation (hyperparameter tuning without leakage)
Stratified Group K-Fold (avoiding leakage across grouping keys)
Time-series split structures

topics.title: Decision Trees Mathematics
subtopics: Shannon Entropy and Gini Impurity math proofs
Information Gain and variance reduction
Cost-complexity pruning algorithms (weakest-link pruning)

topics.title: Bagging & Random Forests
subtopics: Bootstrap aggregation math
Out-of-bag (OOB) error estimation and feature subspace sampling de-correlation

topics.title: Boosting Algorithms & Tree Libraries
subtopics: Functional gradient descent derivation, AdaBoost exponential loss
XGBoost second-order Taylor expansion optimization math
LightGBM leaf-wise growth vs CatBoost symmetric structures

modules.name: Module 5: Unsupervised Learning, Explainability & Production MLOps

topics.title: Clustering Mechanics & Convergence
subtopics: K-Means convergence proof and K-Means++ initialization math
Silhouette coefficient and DBSCAN density connectivity rules
Hierarchical linkages

topics.title: Dimensionality Reduction Derivations
subtopics: PCA derivation via covariance eigendecomposition
SVD PCA formulation
t-SNE probability mapping and Student-t distribution heavy-tail resolution

topics.title: Anomaly Detection & Time Series
subtopics: Isolation Forest path length math, One-Class SVM boundaries
Autoencoder reconstruction thresholds
Time Series stationarity (ADF test), ARIMA

topics.title: Explainable AI (XAI) Mathematics
subtopics: Shapley value cooperative game theory axioms
SHAP kernels math, LIME local perturbation linear models

topics.title: Enterprise MLOps & Serving Pipelines
subtopics: Model quantization (PTQ vs QAT math and zero-point scaling)
ONNX runtime compilation and Triton routing configurations
Concept/Data drift metrics (Kolmogorov-Smirnov test, Population Stability Index)
